name: Dr. Margaret Collins
notes: Senior partner. Particularly experienced with elderly patients and long term conditions. Preferred GP for diabetic patients.

name: Dr. James Whitfield
notes: Experienced in mental health and skin conditions. Absent 18th June 2025. Patients needing urgent mental health support on that day should be offered Dr Collins or Dr Bennett.

name: Dr. Priya Patel
notes: Specialises in womens health and family planning. Absent 15th June 2025. Only female GP — patients who prefer female doctor should be offered Dr Collins as alternative when Dr Patel unavailable. Speaks Gujarati and Hindi.

name: Dr. Oliver Bennett
notes: Lead GP for children and respiratory conditions. Best choice for childhood illnesses, asthma reviews, and COPD management. Available all week.

name: Nurse Sarah Williams
notes: Practice nurse handling all routine clinical procedures. Nurse appointments are longer and more available than GP slots. Always offer nurse appointment when patient need does not require GP diagnosis. Blood pressure checks, vaccinations, dressings, blood tests, smear tests, NHS health checks, ear syringing and ECGs should always be booked with Nurse Williams not a GP.
